textByHash.0fe894a127a0396f8e4985412391c2a829cc70dc: If ye get hit by the waves or fire, don't be surprised when ye lose those fish an' tools ye gathered. Now get t' the fight, sailor!
textByHash.1b049c1d34c24c4f12201df0c7a18d8fe1d33c29: Storm clouds are rolling in, get your buckets ready!
textByHash.1c69b69fe5ac34a305ec57dc6f4d0512891fc163: The storm has grown too strong, we must retreat!
textByHash.248378a6e384a6b2d0542bd540b66f4f31f5f664: The totem pole has been damaged!
textByHash.2677c325104503f5909ed4684c493bce763bf2a7: If Tempoross electrocutes a cannon t' stop it from firin', ya better load your harpoonfish into the other ammunition crates t' keep them cannons firin' instead.
textByHash.2bb51232a04593ba5cfdad8815ccd8d471f36e9e: Tempoross is drawing in water, prepare yourselves!
textByHash.409f473fa8ee5abad480dd9ee7b3596713ee40d2: Tempoross has gathered too much energy!
textByHash.5748558c280c803f2156ade5ffdfbcd501b56eac: Take a well deserved rest but don't get too comfy, it'll regain its energy soon enough!
textByHash.580ae5698216aecee619306b6b0db0340a20cd9d: Get yerself a harpoon from the crate on the ship, then go fish around the island t' catch some harpoonfish. They make fer fine ammo against Tempoross!
textByHash.5c8ff235628ed1f107613a087aba996065a30db7: Our cannoneers will get t' firin' the harpoonfish at Tempoross. When it's weak an' submerges to recover its energy, get down to the jetty next t' the ship an' fish those spirit pools.
textByHash.63121fc5ee3f19d49e04b0e2d7ad2769a2185ca5: Be quick with fishin' those spirit pools though, or it'll come back so strong we'll have to abandon the fight! With any luck, we'll weaken those spirit fish enough t' subdue Tempoross. Now get t' the fight, sailor!
textByHash.7243f8473d33349801c52c28f5bf1310610d6e55: Tempoross has submerged, fish from the whirlpools!
textByHash.73d8a7e1053b51046a3017c9e4b96447d78f9ee6: Oh, an' keep an eye out for lightnin' clouds causin' fires. Get a bucket from the ship crates, fill it with water at a pump, and get t' puttin it out before it spreads.
textByHash.7d62d2142609a704b6c695ee6fe3d60276f7adde: We did it! Tempoross has been sudbued once again. Well done!
textByHash.823a093df16fcc0193f528efde0b9a125f607061: What do you need, adventurer? There is a battle to fight!
textByHash.8887ea7a5bfd11afb3c2fbd3181a59e6d9870d3d: If the waves break the totem pole or ship mast, ye can grab a hammer from the ship crates t' fix 'em up before the next big wave hits.
textByHash.91ed6eb87ba402966ca12fe197201d121c914d25: Tempoross will surface soon, prepare yourselves!
textByHash.a3fd751580bea2fb1bd0efa80e29f39ad65182f2: Keep an eye on the waves!
textByHash.a7e55484ca1ea7724b8059a248d46721e097cc4d: We usually find some debris washed up near the docks back at Unkah. Feel free t' have a look. Ya might find somethin' useful!
textByHash.a847118afa99230092328894e2d87bebd0e3f631: Tempoross has retreated to the depths!
textByHash.b44d2203498de1fc496839639763802cbae3291f: Once ye caught some, ye can cook 'em at the shrines on the island if ye want 'em to pack more of a punch. Then come back t' the ship an' load 'em in the ammunition crates next to the cannons.
textByHash.bbef8bd2e5aefff1358a9e4454d2e35ea15710b0: It won't be long before Tempoross regains enough energy to be a problem and we'll have to wrangle it again. Hopefully we can count on you to 'elp!
textByHash.bda5e82627f33b42c0c33e81e739491f20326b62: Also, make sure t' grab a rope from the ship crates an' keep an eye out for big waves. We'll make sure t' shout about them. Then ye best quickly tether yerself t' an island totem pole or ship mast with that rope.
textByHash.d3aea1a81a5d4d99148a92d501d7853bb7745c88: Really? You will receive no reward if you do.
textByHash.deee8b34d5c0bc08065ed5eaf97e075553915c13: Tempoross has surfaced, keep those cannons firing!
